meta.title: Mikhail Kalachev — Fullstack Developer | Portfolio
meta.description: Fullstack developer with 4+ years of experience: React, Next.js, Vue, Laravel, automation, and architecture for international platforms. Portfolio, case studies, and contact.

manifesto.label: Approach
manifesto.title: Systems, not components
paragraphs: For me, development is building a system where every part works predictably and is ready to grow over years.
My core skill is diving into business domains and finding solutions that deliver real value.
